top_candidates.reasoning: The engineering layer's structural signature — THREE pairs in three distinct registers (Datadog/target/competitor), 'identical dispositional posture toward all three categories,' the explicit guard against erasure ('telemetry still fluctuates, targets still carry numbers, competitors still launch'), the closing claim that engagement from this state does not entrench bondage (mapped to burnout/blame-displacement/defensive code) — uniquely matches sukha-duḥkhe + lābhālābhau + jayājayau + same kṛtvā + tato yuddhāya yujyasva + naivaṁ pāpam avāpsyasi. The three-pair enumeration with explicit register-distinctness is the 2.38 signature; 2.47 has right-to-action / not-to-fruits, 2.48 has yoga-sthaḥ-kuru-karmāṇi, 2.56 has the achieved-state description. None of these has the three-pair structural signature.
Doctrinal cousin via niṣkāma-karma but no three-pair enumeration.
Doctrinal cousin (imperative) but no three-pair enumeration.
